standard.substance: psilocybin mushrooms (various; pattern across many sessions)
standard.setting: home, alone, end of trip — shower with exfoliating gloves + Dr. Bronner's peppermint soap; water noise + closed door = audio isolation
standard.afterglow_texture: sensory isolation; background loop 'I want out'; inquiry; ritual scrubbing of dense matter off the soul

astral_plane: physical density (stuffness — addressed by the ritual)
weird.entity_hierarchy: none — solo self-working; the Operator acts through the Avatar's own hands

tetragrammaton_association.strength: partial — often preceded by watching the Tetragrammaton, but occurs independently
tetragrammaton_association.note: first assumed causal; later recognized as independent

cross_links.tr-0001: embodied mirror of the Cleansing (fractal janitors scrubbed her; here she scrubs herself); stuffness cosmology given a standing practice; 'I want out' = the burn-loop as background process

open_questions: felt completion state vs. shower simply ending
where does the scrubbed-off stuff go
does pre-watching the Tetragrammaton change the ritual's texture

provenance.notes: recurring pattern report, not a single dated session
